product_overview: Creatorly is an integrated creator commerce platform that provides creators a customizable storefront, product management, payments via Razorpay, automated DM/email workflows and admin controls to run and scale digital sales in India.
core_goals: Enable creators to launch a customizable storefront and sell digital products with secure delivery and Indian payments (Razorpay).
Provide simple product and order management (upload, publish, delivery, resend, refunds) with measurable analytics.
Support subscription billing with trial handling and webhook-driven idempotent processing.
Offer automation (AutoDM, email sequences) and integrations for creator growth and reduced manual work.
Ship a secure API surface with role-based admin controls and clear error behavior for integrations.

features.name: Authentication & Onboarding
features.description: User signup, username validation, phone OTP, onboarding steps and initial account creation tied to Razorpay mandate and trial activation.
user_flows: GET /api/auth/check-username?u=desired_username -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { available: true } } -> POST /api/auth/send-otp with { phone: '+91XXXXXXXXXX' } -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { sent: true } } -> POST /api/onboarding/complete with { username, name, email, phone, razorpayMandateId } -> Receive 201 { success: true, data: { userId, onboardingComplete: false } } -> GET /api/auth/me with Authorization: Bearer <firebase_id_token> -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { user profile } }
POST /api/onboarding/complete with missing razorpayMandateId -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: 'mandate_required', code: 'MANDATE_REQUIRED' }
GET /api/auth/me without Authorization header -> Receive 401 { success: false, error: 'Unauthorized', code: 'UNAUTHORIZED' }

features.name: Creator Profile & Storefront API
features.description: Retrieve and update a creator's storefront configuration (theme, layout, profile media), used by the dashboard and storefront rendering.
user_flows: GET /api/creator/profile with valid Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { profile, storefrontConfig } } -> PATCH /api/creator/profile with valid Authorization and payload { theme: { primary: '#...', text: '#...' }, blocksLayout: [...] } -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { updatedProfile } }
GET /api/creator/profile without Authorization header -> Receive 401 { success: false, error: 'Unauthorized' }
PATCH /api/creator/profile with Authorization and malformed blocksLayout JSON -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: 'Validation error: blocksLayout must be valid JSON', code: 'INVALID_PAYLOAD' }

features.name: Product Management API
features.description: Create, list, update and reorder products for a creator's storefront; supports file uploads via presigned S3 URLs and publish toggles.
user_flows: POST /api/products with Authorization: Bearer <token> and payload { name, description, price, productType, thumbnailKey, fileKey, isPublished } -> Receive 201 { success: true, data: { productId, slug } } -> GET /api/products with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: [ { productId, name, price, isPublished, ... } ] }
POST /api/products with Authorization and invalid price (non-numeric) -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: 'Validation error: price must be number (paise)', code: 'INVALID_PRICE' }
GET /api/products without Authorization header -> Receive 401 { success: false, error: 'Unauthorized' }

features.name: Order Management API
features.description: List and manage orders for a creator, resend delivery emails and handle order exports; orders are created after Razorpay webhook confirmation and include presigned S3 download links.
user_flows: GET /api/checkout/:productId (public) -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { product, price, checkoutTokens } } -> POST /api/checkout/create-payment with checkout payload -> Receive 201 { success: true, data: { razorpayOrderId } } -> (Razorpay) POST /api/webhooks/razorpay with raw body and valid x-razorpay-signature -> Receive 200 { received: true } -> GET /api/orders with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: [ { orderId, productId, status: 'completed', downloadUrl: 'presigned_url' } ] }
POST /api/orders/:id/resend with Authorization: Bearer <token> for existing orderId -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { resent: true } }
POST /api/checkout/verify with invalid payment signature -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: 'Invalid payment signature', code: 'INVALID_SIGNATURE' }
GET /api/orders without Authorization header -> Receive 401 { success: false, error: 'Unauthorized' }

features.name: Subscription & Billing
features.description: Create Razorpay subscriptions (with 14-day trial), verify mandates, and process Razorpay webhook events to activate or halt subscription access.
user_flows: POST /api/subscription/create with payload { planId, customer: { name, email }, cycle } -> Receive 201 { success: true, data: { razorpaySubscriptionId, subscriptionDraft } } -> POST /api/subscription/verify with mandate signature data -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { verified: true } } -> (Razorpay) POST /api/webhooks/razorpay subscription.activated event with valid signature -> Receive 200 { received: true }
POST /api/webhooks/razorpay with raw body and invalid x-razorpay-signature -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: 'Invalid signature' }
POST /api/subscription/create missing required planId -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: 'Validation error: planId required', code: 'MISSING_PLAN' }

features.name: Social Feed & oEmbed API
features.description: Proxy endpoint to fetch oEmbed metadata for social platform URLs used in storefront embeds (no auth required).
user_flows: GET /api/storefront/oembed?platform=instagram&url=https://www.instagram.com/p/ABC123/ -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { html, provider_name, thumbnail_url, author_name } }
GET /api/storefront/oembed?platform=instagram without url param -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: 'Missing url parameter', code: 'MISSING_PARAM' }
GET /api/storefront/oembed?platform=unsupported&url=https://... -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: 'Unsupported platform', code: 'UNSUPPORTED_PLATFORM' }

features.name: Admin Management API
features.description: Admin-only endpoints for platform announcements, user and plan management, webhook logs and plan price syncs to Razorpay.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/announcements with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: [ { id, title, body, createdAt } ] }
PUT /api/admin/plans/:planId/price with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> and payload { monthly, yearly } -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { planId, syncedToRazorpay: true } }
GET /api/admin/announcements with non-admin Authorization -> Receive 403 { success: false, error: 'Forbidden: admin role required', code: 'FORBIDDEN' }

features.name: Creator Profile & Storefront API
features.description: CRUD operations for creator profiles, storefront layouts, and theme settings.

endpoints.description: Get the current creator's profile and storefront configuration.
Update storefront layout and theme settings.
List products for the authenticated creator.

features.name: Order Management API
features.description: APIs for processing and managing orders.

endpoints.description: List orders for the authenticated creator.

features.name: Social Feed & oEmbed API
features.description: Proxy service for fetching social media embed data.

endpoints.description: Fetch oEmbed data for a given platform and URL.

known_limitations.issue: Minimal input validation on some storefront settings
known_limitations.impact: Potentially allows malformed JSON in blocksLayout
